lastSession.summary: Fixed two bugs in autonomous mode: completed features not archived (missing ARCHIVE_FILE path, terse subagent/orchestrator archival instructions), stale local branches remaining after merge (no git branch -d in Phase 6 or autonomous post-merge cleanup)
completedTasks: Fixed autonomous archival: added ARCHIVE_FILE to Phase A.1, explicit archival in subagent prompt, detailed archival procedure with verification in Phase A.5
Fixed local branch cleanup: added git branch -d + git fetch --prune to Phase 6 step 29 and Phase A.5 step 26
Bumped version to 10.0.1, updated README changelog
nextSteps: Address pending features in active.json (feature-001 through feature-007)
feature-001: Add acceptanceCriteria to feature schema
feature-002: Add agentTeams and ATDD config sections
